Dialog.name: MND_SEED_GROWTH
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like the produce can be harvested...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SEED_THINK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What should I plant...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SEED_HARVEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like I can harvest them[n]from {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 1}/{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27} onwards.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SEED_DAY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like it can be harvested on {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 1}/{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_PLANT_AGAIN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I plant something...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SEED_TUTORIAL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the rooftop planter that[n]I was told to take care of.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_NO_PLANT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Nothing is planted in the soil of the planter.[n]Looks like we can plant some seedlings...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_NO_PLANT_DORMITORY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, I don't think I've planted[n]anything in the rooftop planters yet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_PLANT_ALREADY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The {f 4 4 1 37 0 0} has been planted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_PLANT_MORE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The harvest has increased. Maybe it's[n]because I studied how to grow them well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_PLANT_CAN_NOT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like I won't be able to harvest it[n]before the Promised Day, January 31st...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I often took care of the plants[n]here with my dormmates...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Through cultivating the crops together, I was[n]able to deepen the bonds with my friends...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I took care of the plants together[n]with my dormmates now and then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to that, we were able to[n]harvest some high-quality produce...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Nothing has been planted[n]in the rooftop planter...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_PLANT_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There should still be produce in the rooftop[n]planter that has yet to be harvested.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should harvest those first...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_PLANT_LAST_DAY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll come harvest these if we get[n]through the Promised Day safely...[n]{f 1 1}
